author: @stemcampprojects7951
text: Wish I could get there - but like many people, I'm across the pond.  Please consider running a paid webinar for remote folks like me.  The 3 hour seminar would probably be similar, and then replace the 4 hour lab with an hour or two for questions.  Rob is a natural teacher, and I think he'd be great at it.  You could also offer replays of the webinar for a fee as well!  (typically cheaper than live attendance because you don't get to ask questions)  Just a thought from a fan, -leo-
